rules.title: APM: Browser Fingerprinting via Canvas/WebGL/AudioContext
rules.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (( (('Span Attributes' like '*canvas.toDataURL*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*toBlob*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*getImageData*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*webgl.getParameter*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*WEBGL_debug_renderer_info*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*getExtension*')) ) or ( (('Span Attributes' like '*AudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*OfflineAudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*createOscillator*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*navigator.plugins*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*navigator.languages*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*screen.colorDepth*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*navigator.hardwareConcurrency*')) ) or ( (('Span Attributes' like '*canvas.toDataURL*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*toBlob*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*getImageData*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*AudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*OfflineAudioContext*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*createOscillator*')) )) | stats count as FingerprintAttempts by 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'Service Name' | sort -FingerprintAttempts

rules.title: APM: Clickjacking - Missing Frame Protection Headers
rules.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (('Response Code' = '200' and 'Content Type' like '*text/html*') and not (('Response Headers' like '*X-Frame-Options*' or 'Response Headers' like '*frame-ancestors*'))) | stats count as MissingHeaders by 'Request URL', 'Service Name' | sort -MissingHeaders

rules.title: APM: CSRF Token Missing or Invalid on State-Changing Request
rules.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ((('HTTP Method' = 'POST' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PUT' or 'HTTP Method' = 'DELETE' or 'HTTP Method' = 'PATCH')) and (not ('Referrer' like '*')) and not (('Request URL' like '*/api/health*' or 'Request URL' like '*/api/status*' or 'Request URL' like '*/login*' or 'Request URL' like '*/oauth*' or 'Request URL' like '*/webhook*'))) | stats count as Violations by 'Request URL', 'HTTP Method', 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Violations

rules.title: APM: DOM-Based Attack via Dangerous JavaScript APIs
rules.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ((('Span Attributes' like '*document.cookie*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*document.domain*')) or (('Span Attributes' like '*eval(*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*Function(*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*setTimeout(*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*setInterval(*')) or (('Span Attributes' like '*.innerHTML*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*.outerHTML*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*document.write*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*insertAdjacentHTML*')) or (('Span Attributes' like '*location.hash*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*location.search*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*window.name*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*document.referrer*'))) | stats count as Attacks by 'Request URL', 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'Service Name' | sort -Attacks

rules.title: APM: Session Hijacking - Rapid Session Changes
rules.query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (('Span Name' like '*HTTP*')) | stats distinctcount('Session ID') as SessionCount, count as Requests by 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'Service Name' | where SessionCount > 5 | sort -SessionCount

rules.title: APM: SQL Injection Attack in Request

rules.title: Linux Kernel Module Loaded from Temp Directory
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'insmod' and (msg like '*/tmp/*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/*' or msg like '*/var/tmp/*')))

rules.title: Linux LD_PRELOAD Library Hijacking
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*LD_PRELOAD=*' or msg like '*/etc/ld.so.preload*' or msg like '*ld.so.preload*')))

rules.title: Linux Log File Tampering
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*rm -f /var/log*' or msg like '*rm -rf /var/log*' or msg like '*truncate -s 0 /var/log*' or msg like '*cat /dev/null > /var/log*' or msg like '*shred /var/log*' or msg like '*journalctl --vacuum*')))

rules.title: Linux Network Service Scanning
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*nmap') or ('Process Name' like '*masscan') or ('Process Name' like '*zmap') or ((msg like '*nmap -s*' or msg like '*nmap -p*' or msg like '*masscan -p*' or msg like '*zmap -p*')))

rules.title: Linux Password File Direct Modification
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*>> /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*> /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*>> /etc/shadow*' or msg like '*> /etc/shadow*')) or ((msg like '*tee /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*tee -a /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*sed -i.*/etc/passwd*' or msg like '*sed -i.*/etc/shadow*')))

rules.title: Linux Post-Exploitation Enumeration Script
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*linpeas*' or msg like '*LinEnum*' or msg like '*linux-exploit-suggester*' or msg like '*linux-smart-enumeration*' or msg like '*pspy*' or msg like '*unix-privesc-check*')))

rules.title: Linux Process Execution from /dev/shm
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((msg like '*/dev/shm/*'))

rules.title: Linux Process Injection via Ptrace
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*ptrace(PTRACE_ATTACH*' or msg like '*PTRACE_POKETEXT*' or msg like '*PTRACE_POKEDATA*' or msg like '*strace -p*' or msg like '*gdb --pid*' or msg like '*gdb -p*')))

rules.title: Linux Process Memory Access via /proc
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/proc/self/maps*' or msg like '*/proc/self/mem*' or msg like '*/proc/self/environ*' or msg like '*/proc/*/maps*' or msg like '*/proc/*/mem*' or msg like '*/proc/*/environ*')))

rules.title: Linux Proxy and Tunneling Tool Detected
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs') and 'Process Name' = 'bash' and (((msg like '*chisel client*' or msg like '*chisel server*')) or ((msg like '*ligolo-ng*' or msg like '*ligolo-proxy*')) or ((msg like '*frpc -c*' or msg like '*frps -c*' or msg like '*frp.ini*')) or ((msg like '*reGeorg*' or msg like '*tunnel.aspx*' or msg like '*tunnel.jsp*')) or ((msg like '*proxychains*' or msg like '*tsocks*' or msg like '*revsocks*')))

rules.title: Linux Reverse Shell Detected
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/dev/tcp/*' or msg like '*bash -i >&*' or msg like '*nc -e /bin*' or msg like '*ncat -e /bin*' or msg like '*mkfifo /tmp*')))

rules.title: Linux Sensitive Data Collection from Local System
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs') and 'Process Name' = 'bash' and (((msg like '*cat /root/.ssh/id_rsa*' or msg like '*cat /home/*/.ssh/id_rsa*' or msg like '*cp /root/.ssh/*' or msg like '*find / -name id_rsa*')) or ((msg like '*.oci/config*' or msg like '*.aws/credentials*' or msg like '*.gcloud/*' or msg like '*.kube/config*')) or ((msg like '*.env*' or msg like '*database.yml*' or msg like '*wp-config.php*' or msg like '*application.properties*' or msg like '*settings.py*')))

rules.title: Linux Setuid Binary Creation
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*chmod +s*' or msg like '*chmod u+s*' or msg like '*chmod g+s*' or msg like '*chmod 4755*' or msg like '*chmod 4775*' or msg like '*chmod 2755*' or msg like '*chmod 6755*')))

rules.title: Linux Shell Profile Persistence
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*.bashrc*' or msg like '*.bash_profile*' or msg like '*.profile*' or msg like '*/etc/profile.d/*' or msg like '*/etc/bash.bashrc*')))

rules.title: Linux SSH Authorized Keys Modified

rules.title: Linux SSH Failed Login

rules.title: Linux SSH Tunneling Detected
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*ssh -L*' or msg like '*ssh -R*' or msg like '*ssh -D*' or msg like '*ssh -N -f*' or msg like '*autossh*')))

rules.title: Linux Sudo Usage
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'sudo' and msg like '*COMMAND=*'))

rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/etc/cron*' or msg like '*/var/spool/cron*')) and ((msg like '*curl|sh*' or msg like '*wget|sh*' or msg like '*curl|bash*' or msg like '*wget|bash*' or msg like '*base64 -d*')))

rules.title: Linux Suspicious Download to /tmp

rules.title: Linux Suspicious Network Traffic Redirect
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*iptables -t nat -A PREROUTING*' or msg like '*iptables -t nat -A OUTPUT*' or msg like '*iptables -A FORWARD*' or msg like '*nft add rule.*dnat*' or msg like '*nft add rule.*redirect*')))

rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*w *' or msg like '*who -a*' or msg like '*last -a*' or msg like '*lastlog*' or msg like '*getent passwd*' or msg like '*cat /etc/group*' or msg like '*groups root*')))

rules.title: Linux Systemd Service Persistence
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*systemctl enable*' or msg like '*systemctl daemon-reload*' or msg like '*/etc/systemd/system/*')) and (msg like '*.service*'))

rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\winrs.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*-r:*'))

rules.title: Windows Remote System Discovery
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*arp.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*-a*') or (('Command Line' like '*for /l*' or 'Command Line' like '*ping -n 1*')) or ('Process Name' like '*nslookup.exe') or (('Command Line' like '*Test-Connection*' or 'Command Line' like '*Test-NetConnection*' or 'Command Line' like '*Resolve-DnsName*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ADComputer*')) or (('Command Line' like '*nbtscan*' or 'Command Line' like '*nbtstat -a*')))

rules.title: Windows Scheduled Task Created or Updated
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' in ('4698', '4702') and ('Task Name' like '*Update*' or 'Task Name' like '*Cache*' or 'Command Line' like '*powershell*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Users\\Public\\*' or msg like '*Task Name*') | stats count as TaskChanges, unique('Task Name') as Tasks, unique('Command Line') as Commands by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -TaskChanges

rules.title: Windows Scheduled Task Creation via Schtasks
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*schtasks.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/create*' or 'Command Line' like '*-create*')))

rules.title: Windows Screen Capture Activity
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*SnippingTool.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*ScreenClippingHost.exe')) or (('Command Line' like '*nircmd savescreenshot*' or 'Command Line' like '*nircmd.exe savescreenshot*')) or (('Command Line' like '*[System.Drawing.Graphics]::CopyFromScreen*' or 'Command Line' like '*System.Windows.Forms.Screen*' or 'Command Line' like '*Screenshot*' or 'Command Line' like '*CopyFromScreen*')) or (('Command Line' like '*screencapture*' or 'Command Line' like '*screenshot.exe*' or 'Command Line' like '*capture.exe*')))

rules.title: Windows Script Host Execution from Temp
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*\\cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\wscript.exe') and ('Command Line' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\tmp\\*')))

rules.title: Windows Security or System Event Log Cleared
rules.query: (('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '1102') or ('Log Source' = 'Windows Event System Logs' and 'Event ID' = '104') | stats count as ClearEvents by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -ClearEvents

rules.title: Windows Service Created with Suspicious Binary Path
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\sc.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*create*') and (('Command Line' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\AppData\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Users\\*')))

rules.title: Windows Service Creation via SC
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*sc.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*create*'))

rules.title: Windows Service Installed from Event Logs
rules.query: (('Log Source' = 'Windows Event System Logs' and 'Event ID' = '7045') or (('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4697')) and ('Service File Name' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Service File Name' like '*\\Users\\Public\\*' or 'Service File Name' like '*\\ProgramData\\*' or 'Service File Name' like '*powershell*' or msg like '*Service File Name*') | stats count as ServiceInstalls, unique('Service Name') as Services, unique('Service File Name') as ServiceBinaries by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -ServiceInstalls

rules.title: Windows Shadow Copy Deletion
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*vssadmin.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*delete shadows*' or 'Command Line' like '*Delete Shadows*')) or ('Process Name' like '*wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*shadowcopy delete*'))

rules.title: Windows Spearphishing Attachment Execution
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Parent Process Name' like '*winword.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*excel.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*powerpnt.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*outlook.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*msaccess.exe')) and (('Process Name' like '*cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*pwsh.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*mshta.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*regsvr32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*rundll32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*certutil.exe')))

rules.title: Windows UAC Bypass Attempt
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*fodhelper.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*eventvwr.exe') or ('Process Name' like '*sdclt.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/kickoffelev*') or ('Process Name' like '*cmstp.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/au*'))

rules.title: Windows Vault Enumeration
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( ('Process Name' like '*\\cmdkey.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/list*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\rundll32.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*keymgr.dll*') ))

rules.title: Windows WDigest Authentication Enabled for Credential Harvesting
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*reg.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*UseLogonCredential*'))

rules.title: Windows WMI Event Subscription Persistence
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*__EventFilter*' or 'Command Line' like '*__EventConsumer*' or 'Command Line' like '*__FilterToConsumerBinding*' or 'Command Line' like '*ActiveScriptEventConsumer*' or 'Command Line' like '*CommandLineEventConsumer*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Set-WmiInstance*' or 'Command Line' like '*Register-WmiEvent*' or 'Command Line' like '*New-CimInstance -ClassName __*')))

rules.title: Winlogon Helper DLL Modification
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Winlogon*' and 'Command Line' like '*Shell*' and 'Command Line' like '*reg*')))

rules.title: WinRM Lateral Movement via PowerShell
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Invoke-Command*' or 'Command Line' like '*Enter-PSSession*' or 'Command Line' like '*-ComputerName*')))

rules.title: WMI Event Subscription Persistence
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*ActiveScriptEventConsumer*' and 'Command Line' like '*__EventFilter*')))

rules.title: WMI Process Execution via Wmic
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*process*' and 'Command Line' like '*call*' and 'Command Line' like '*create*')))

rules.title: Wscript Running Encoded Script
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*\\wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\cscript.exe') and ('Command Line' like '*.vbe' or 'Command Line' like '*.jse' or 'Command Line' like '*.wse' or 'Command Line' like '*.wsf')))

rules.title: XSL Script Processing via WMIC or Msxsl
rules.query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( ('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/format:*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\msxsl.exe') ))
